reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
A disaster, 2 hours unloading the fuel, a disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN0d2JxUjdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Increíble! El 1/1 era lo único que había abierto en todo el pueblo, pudimos desayunar. Nos atendieron super bien. Las medialunas ricas, el cafe estaba muy bueno. La carta es sencilla pero mas que aceptable para estar siempre disponibles

(Translated by Google)
Incredible! 1/1 was the only place open in the whole town, and we were able to have breakfast. The service was excellent. The croissants were delicious, and the coffee was very good. The menu is simple but more than acceptable, considering they're always available.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN0NnREeC1RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lo mejor de todo en esta estación son los baños... Son un quirófano!! Y muy atento el personal de limpieza de los mismos.. por más empleados así..

(Translated by Google)
The best thing about this station is the restrooms... They're like an operating room!! And the cleaning staff are very attentive... we need more employees like that!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN0Z3BqSFVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Nunca me atendieron tan bien en un baño como la YPF. La señora re atenta y simpática

(Translated by Google)
I've never received such good service in a restroom as at the YPF. The lady was incredibly attentive and friendly.

reviews.comment:
Una genial.señora que esta en los baños, super limpios, amorosa, muy buena onda!!!! En ningún lado vi alguien comp.ella. con tan.buen actitud.

(Translated by Google)
A great lady in the restrooms, super clean, loving, and very friendly! I've never seen anyone like her with such a good attitude anywhere else.
